Home / Research Track

Find My Code Twin: Improving Snippet Search via Semantic Clustering

Seokjun Ko

Samsung Electronics Co.

Jane Doe

MIT

Abstract

We present SNIPPET SEARCH, a high-performance code search tool that leverages semantic clustering to improve retrieval accuracy.

Our evaluation on open-source benchmarks shows a 34% improvement over baseline methods.

When
Tue 15 Apr 2026 11:45
Session
AI for Software Engineering 1
Room
Asia I
DOI Pre-print Distinguished Paper Award
